title: Float match fails for some values.
description:
PREFIX xsd:<http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX up:<http://purl.uniprot.org/core/>
PREFIX rdfs:<http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?float
WHERE { ?uniref up:identity ?float .
FILTER (?float != 1.0 && ?float != 0.5)
}

Find answers while showing that 0.9 is a common potential value for ?float.
However querying directly for 0.9 returns no values.
PREFIX xsd:<http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX up:<http://purl.uniprot.org/core/>
PREFIX rdfs:<http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT * WHERE { ?uniref up:identity 0.9 }

Putting the match into a filter like this
PREFIX xsd:<http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX up:<http://purl.uniprot.org/core/>
PREFIX rdfs:<http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT * WHERE { ?uniref up:identity ?float
FILTER(sameTerm(?float, 0.9)) }

Does not help
You can try these queries at lod.openlinksw.com/sparql
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_floats (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value FLOAT NOT NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_floats WHERE value != 1.0 AND value != 0.5;
SELECT id FROM test_floats WHERE value = 0.9;
SELECT id FROM test_floats WHERE value IS NULL OR value = 0.9;
key_bug_features: Float match fails for value 0.9 in queries.
